name: Cider Bugs
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the oranges and remove the pulp as best you can.
2. Place the orange halves in a 250 degree oven for about 2 hours on warm, allowing them to cool thoroughly.
3. In one of the half shells, mound brown sugar.
4. Arrange cinnamon sticks along the sides (6 to 8 depending on the size of the orange) as legs.
5. Insert a whole nutmeg into the sugar as the head and two whole cloves for eyes.
6. Wrap the oranges in tissue paper or colored plastic wrap.
7. Instructions: Drop into two quarts of cider and heat through.
My neighbors love these and ask for them year after year.
